nationality.infer_reason: Born in Guangzhou and described as brought up in the mainland; relocated to Hong Kong at age 21.
nationality.source: The defendant was born in Guangzhou in July 1956 and is 68. He relocated to Hong Kong when he was 21.

age_at_offence.source: The defendant was born in Guangzhou in July 1956

age_at_sentencing.source: The defendant was born in Guangzhou in July 1956 and is 68.

gender.source: He relocated to Hong Kong when he was 21.

parental_status.source: The defendant contributes about RMB800 towards his daughter’s living expenses, who is 18 years old and studying nursing in Guangzhou.

health_conditions.name: Drug addiction (former)
health_conditions.source: He has since quit his drug use and plans to be reunited with his daughter in the mainland upon release, and to never return to Hong Kong.

health_conditions.name: Cardiac disease
health_conditions.source: The defendant suffers from cardiac disease, diabetes, kidney problems, hernia and polyps.

health_conditions.name: Diabetes
health_conditions.source: The defendant suffers from cardiac disease, diabetes, kidney problems, hernia and polyps.

health_conditions.name: Kidney problems
health_conditions.source: The defendant suffers from cardiac disease, diabetes, kidney problems, hernia and polyps.

health_conditions.name: Polyps
health_conditions.source: The defendant suffers from cardiac disease, diabetes, kidney problems, hernia and polyps.

occupation.source: The defendant was working as a construction site worker in 2015, earning around $30,000, when he suffered a hand injury forcing him to stop.

monthly_wage.source: His health had since deteriorated and had to rely on CSSA of $5,300 per month for his daily and medical expenses since 2017.

criminal_records.source: He was convicted in 1979 for 7 charges of theft, together with one of rape and one of robbery, and sentenced to a total of 9 years imprisonment.
His last conviction was on 2 October 2019, when he was sentenced to 18 months’ imprisonment for possession of dangerous drugs.

positive_habits_after_arrest.source: He has since quit his drug use and plans to be reunited with his daughter in the mainland upon release, and to never return to Hong Kong.
